series_metadata.series_description: Documents financial transactions and use of commission funds relating to task force operations. Records include, but are not limited to, bank statements, invoices, vouchers, travel expense reports, and other expenditure documents created during a task force''s operation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 5 years after closing of task force, provided audited. ; Paper: Retain 5 years after closing of task force, provided audited, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
